items.badge_description: Want to enjoy a day of brews, but need to keep your wits sharp? There are plenty of delicious brews under 5% for you to sip on throughout the day. That's 290 different beers with an ABV of 5% and lower.

At first taste, dark ales can be overwhelming for even the most skilled of beer drinkers, but your will is weak and with time you will eventually turn to the dark side. That's 15 different beers with the style of Dark Ale, Belgian Strong Dark Ale, Lager - Dark, IPA - Black / Cascadian Dark Ale or IPA - Imperial / Double Black, Schwarzbier, or Mild - Dark. Try 5 more for Level 4!
Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 155 distinct venues!

Round and round the wheel goes! Which style you’ll be drinking, nobody knows! Your desire to explore different styles is inspiring. Keep it up! That's a check-in to at least 145 different styles. Try 5 more for Level 30!

items.comment: Looks very spectacular, must try soon!

items.badge_description: Enjoying a nice Night Out on the town? Thanks for taking Untappd along.
So, you're new around here? Congrats on your first brew! This one's for you.

Round and round the wheel goes! Which style you’ll be drinking, nobody knows! Your desire to explore different styles is inspiring. Keep it up! That's a check-in to at least 215 different styles. Try 5 more for Level 44!

user.bio: Drinky drinky, time for less thinky.

items.badge_description: One cannot live on dank hops alone. Tone down the bitterness and enjoy some smooth flavor. That's 275 different beers with an IBU of 20 or below.  Try 5 more for Level 56!

items.checkin_comment: Intriguing??? Like a sprinkle of a stout. For someone who doesn’t love stouts this one slaps

items.badge_description: Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 10 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 3.
Supporting local breweries is what helps the craft beer scene grow. You obviously know this since you’re enjoying the local flavor! Be sure to always drink locally.
It’s been a long week and you deserve a drink, or five. Besides, isn’t that what your check is for?
Are you crazy? Five different types of beer in one day? Hope you were just sampling.

At a new place and don't want to choose a pint of something you may not like? Grab a few tasters! Enjoy some small pours and then decide which to upgrade to a full pour. That's 5 checkins with the serving style of Taster. Try 5 more for Level 2! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

Round and round the wheel goes! Which style you’ll be drinking, nobody knows! Your desire to explore different styles is inspiring. Keep it up! That's a check-in to at least 5 different styles. Try 5 more for Level 2!
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 5 beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 2.

items.checkin_comment: Double dark beers with double D Dave

user.bio:
Tracking beers I love/hate. 
If you’re pro-Trump or his joke of an “administration” just move along.
Beer, travel and war history enthusiast.
UT Moderator, Craft beer nut. Love the hops, love the darks, love the travelling and hanging out with beery people!
Living the Life in San Diego, Partner in Beer: KSwizz, IG: frostydg. Pro-Trumpers can move on!
